compiled_state.title: Add user acknowledgment, idempotency, and resume/restart UX to create-dso-app.sh
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
testing_mode: RED

Extend plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh (created by parent story 8356-7324) with user-facing UX flows.

Requirements from story done definition:
- Before plugin install step: print numbered explanation (1) what DSO plugin is, (2) permission required, (3) what happens next
- Pause for user acknowledgment via 'read'; use exec < /dev/tty to re-attach stdin (safe with bash <(curl -fsSL) invocation form, not curl | bash)
- EOF or Ctrl-C at acknowledgment prompt: exit 1, print 'Installation cancelled.'
- .dso-init-complete present: exit 0 with informative message (idempotency)
- Partial init (project dir exists, .dso-init-complete absent): prompt resume or start fresh; resume continues from last step; start fresh removes partial dir and restarts
- claude launched via exec claude (replaces installer process; interactive)
- 'claude plugin install <url>' called after acknowledgment pause, before launching claude

Acceptance Criteria:
- Verify: grep -q 'exec < /dev/tty' plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh
- Verify: grep -q 'Installation cancelled' plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh
- Verify: grep -q 'exec claude' plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh
- Verify: grep -q 'dso-init-complete' plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh (idempotency check)
- Verify: bash -n plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh
